headline: Boeing Bets On Laser Computing And 737 MAX Orders For Recovery Narrative
summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) entered a partnership with LightSolver to use laser driven computing to tackle complex engineering simulations. The collaboration focuses on improving how Boeing models and tests highly complex problems across its product lifecycle. SCAT Airlines placed a new order for additional Boeing 737-9 jets and converted part of an existing order to the same model. The SCAT Airlines order highlights continued customer interest in the 737 MAX family. For investors tracking NYSE:BA,...

headline: Boeing Teams Up with LightSolver to Advance Laser-Based Computing
summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) has entered into a strategic financial partnership with LightSolver to develop laser-driven computing solutions aimed at accelerating complex engineering simulations. The collaboration is centered on advancing LightSolver’s Laser Processing Unit (LPU) technology, with a focus on applying it to physics-based modeling used in engineering design and lifecycle management.

raw.headline: Boeing Teams Up with LightSolver to Advance Laser-Based Computing

headline: Boeing and LightSolver Form Strategic Financial Partnership to Develop Laser-Based Accelerator for Large-Scale Engineering Simulation
summary: Accelerated PDE solving will make simulations faster, more energy efficient and more accessible across global industriesTEL AVIV, Israel, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LightSolver, a pioneer in laser-based computing for physics-intensive workloads, today announced a strategic financial partnership with Boeing (NYSE: BA) to advance laser-based computing acceleration for complex engineering simulations.
